decisions.reason: gpr_index and policy_unc stop at 2026-03-31 in the current matrix.
decisions.impact: Rows after 2026-03-31 are excluded from official model training/validation/test and forecast export.

decisions.decision: Use weekday-clean matrix for the current stage.
decisions.reason: Saturday and Sunday rows are removed. Official market-holiday filtering has not yet been added.
decisions.impact: Project wording must say weekday-clean, not fully trading-day clean.

decisions.reason: Random splits are invalid for time-series forecasting because they leak future information.
decisions.impact: All later model notebooks must use the locked time windows from this notebook.

decisions.decision: Exclude high_yield from main Regression, SARIMAX, and XGBoost.
decisions.reason: high_yield begins too late for the main common multivariate window.
decisions.impact: high_yield may only appear in optional short-window sensitivity work.

decisions.decision: Use Dataset A for long univariate models and Dataset B for core multivariate models.
decisions.reason: This separates long gold-only history from the shorter common multivariate history.
decisions.impact: Baseline and classical univariate models use 1968-2026 gold history; main multivariate models use 2006-2026 common factor history.
